ProfileCard.title: Software Engineer
ProfileCard.bio_1: Hello! I am Ali Akpoyraz, a 3rd-year Software Engineering student. I love learning new technologies and developing projects. I plan to continue my career in Mobile app development and backend fields, constantly improving myself.
ProfileCard.bio_2: While improving myself, I also care about sharing what I learn with others, which is why I write various blog posts. You can visit my blog page to check them out.

Experience.title: Work & Internship Experience
Experience.aktif_tech_desc: I contributed to the integration of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC, SDTC) steps and methodologies into QA processes. I gained experience in executing functional tests, preparing bug reports, and team communication and coordination in an Agile work environment.
Experience.kayisir_desc: I am responsible for the end-to-end management of e-commerce systems, including comprehensive SEO, digital marketing strategies, and the operational management of multiple marketplaces with a primary focus on Trendyol.
Experience.swordsec_desc: I gained experience in penetration testing and using tools like Nmap, Burpsuite, and Metasploit in the cybersecurity field. I identified and reported security vulnerabilities in real-world scenarios.
Experience.toya_desc: I worked on Toya Pos Systems and ERP solutions. I took part in web development projects and contributed to software processes alongside the team.

Volunteering.title: Volunteering & Community
Volunteering.gdg_desc: I served as a core team member of the Software & Technology department of GDSC, the largest club of our school with 1000+ members in the 2024-2025 season. Together with our club members, we organized various projects, presentations, and events like hackathons, reaching out to many students.
Volunteering.gezi_desc: I served as a board member in our school's travel club. Through this club, we organized various trips in and out of the city, offering students the opportunity to discover new places.
Volunteering.seo_desc: I served as a volunteer instructor in SEO trainings organized by the GDSC OSTİMTECH club. I trained students on fundamental SEO concepts, tools, and strategies.

borsa-app.title: BorsaApp
borsa-app.desc: A mobile application developed using Swift, focused on stock market and finance tracking with Binance and Yahoo API integration. It allows you to track crypto and bist data in real-time, and track your portfolio instantly by adding to favorites via widget or adding your assets.

DevCleaner.title: DevCleaner
DevCleaner.desc: A CleanMyMac application alternative for developers. A MacOS application that allows you to delete files such as unused Xcode caches, Docker images, node_modules files that you previously developed but whose caches continue to be kept on your computer with a few clicks.

e-ticaret-platformu.title: E-Commerce Platform
e-ticaret-platformu.desc: An e-commerce platform developed using modern web technologies, containing all the scenarios needed for an e-commerce site (product listing, cart, payment, membership, order tracking, communication, email confirmation, order email notifications, etc.).

kisisel-portfolyo.title: Personal Portfolio
kisisel-portfolyo.desc: This is the current site you are browsing; built with Next.js 16 and Tailwind v4. It runs on Vercel + GitHub infrastructure, operating entirely without a database for maximum performance in a 'database-less' architecture.

basic-portfolio.title: Basic Portfolio
basic-portfolio.desc: A more minimal, simple, and high-performance portfolio site alternative.
